data.title: Donegal Group Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in Marietta, financial results for the first quarter of 2026 were announced by Donegal Group Inc. (NASDAQ: DGICA) and (NASDAQ: DGICB).

data.title: Bombardier Raises Free Cash Flow Guidance on Sharp Q1 2026 Increase, Records Strong Backlog Growth in Exceptional Quarter
data.description: In Montreal on April 30, 2026, Bombardier Inc. (TSX: BBD.B) reported robust first quarter 2026 results driven by continued order growth and a notable surge in free cash flow. The company revised its 2026 free cash flow outlook, while maintaining all other guidance metrics unchanged.

data.title: Gildan Reports Record First Quarter Revenue and Maintains its Full Year 2026 Guidance
data.description: Gildan Activewear Inc. has reported its performance for the initial quarter concluding on March 29, 2026, and has upheld its projected guidance for the entire year of 2026.

data.title: Cat Financial Reports First-Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee on April 30, 2026, Cat Financial revealed their first-quarter revenue for 2026 as $947 million, showing a growth of $87 million or 10% from the $860 million earned in the same period in 2025. This rise in revenue was largely driven by a positive influence coming from higher...

data.title: Immunic to Participate in Investor and Medical Conferences in May
data.description: On April 30, 2026, Immunic, Inc. (Nasdaq: IMUX), a leading biotech firm specializing in advanced oral treatments for neurologic conditions, revealed its involvement in several key investor and medical conferences in May. Specifically, the company will be taking part in events occurring between May 4-6 and May 12-13...

data.title: ROYAL CARIBBEAN GROUP REPORTS FIRST QUARTER RESULTS THAT EXCEEDED EXPECTATIONS AND PROVIDES AN UPDATE TO FULL YEAR GUIDANCE
data.description: Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) announced today its first quarter financial results for 2026, with Earnings per Share ("EPS") of $3.48 and Adjusted EPS of $3.60. The company exceeded its guidance, attributing this success to higher revenue, reduced costs, and improved overall performance.

data.title: BORGWARNER DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
data.description: On April 29, 2026, BorgWarner Inc. (NYSE: BWA) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.17 per share for its stockholders. The dividend will be paid on June 15, 2026, to those who are recorded as stockholders on June 1, 2026.

data.title: Choice Hotels International Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, there was a 1.7% increase in global net rooms, showing positive growth in the hotel industry. The United States specifically saw an improvement in net rooms growth, reaching a five-year high in hotel openings. Additionally, there was a significant 72% increase in global franchise agreements awarded during this period. Choice Hotels International, Inc., a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol CHH and based in North Bethesda, Maryland, released this information on April 30, 2026.

data.title: Red Cat to Deliver 173 Black Widow™ Drone Systems Under Japan Ministry of Defense Contract
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in Salt Lake City, Red Cat Holdings, Inc. revealed updates regarding a recent contract win in the Asia-Pacific region. The contract, secured after a competitive acquisition process, involves 173 sUAS systems from the Black Widow line. The procurement was overseen by the Acquisition, Technology & Logistics Agency (ATLA), an external body of Japan’s Ministry of Defense handling defense equipment research, development, and procurement. The end-user of these systems is the Japanese Army (JGSDF). Red Cat Holdings, Inc. operates as a U.S.-based company and is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol RCAT, specializing in cutting-edge drone and robotic solutions for defense and national security purposes.

data.title: CNH Industrial N.V. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In the initial quarter of 2026, total revenues amounted to $3.8 billion, remaining steady compared to the previous year when factoring in beneficial currency effects.

data.title: Infosys Ranked as Number One IT Services Provider for Banking in Europe and Financial Services in Nordics by Whitelane Research
data.description: Infosys, a global leader in AI-first business consulting and technology, has been acknowledged as a top three "Exceptional Performer" in Europe for both 'Financial Services - Overall' and 'Cloud & Infrastructure Services.' The recognition came on April 30, 2026, in Bengaluru, India. Infosys is listed on the National Stock Exchange of India (NSE: INFY), Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE: INFY), and New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: INFY).

data.title: Yimutian Inc. Increased Registered ADS Facility by 200 Million Additional ADSs
data.description: Yimutian has announced plans to file for 200 million additional American Depository Shares (ADSs) to support its upcoming growth strategies. The company clarified that there will be no immediate offering or impact on current shareholders through dilution.

data.title: Hedgehog Contributes Open Compute Project Reference Architectures for AI Training and Inference
data.description: As of April 30, 2026, Hedgehog, an AI network company, has introduced new OCP Accepted™ designs that aim to speed up the implementation of open and scalable AI infrastructure. These designs, including the AI training fabric and AI inference technology, are set to simplify the process of constructing and managing AI infrastructure. This initiative is expected to have a significant impact on the efficiency and accessibility of AI technology, potentially leading to growth in AI adoption rates.

data.title: KuCoin Web3 Brings Hundreds of Ondo Tokenized Stocks to Its Self-Custodial Wallet
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in Providenciales, Turks and Caicos Islands, KuCoin Web3 revealed the integration of Ondo Global Markets with KuCoin Web3 Wallet. This move marks a significant expansion of its asset coverage beyond native in-wallet perpetual trading. Ondo Global Markets is recognized as the largest tokenized stocks platform on a global scale. This integration will provide users with access to a wide array of assets, further enhancing their trading experience.
